title: Troubleshooting Cloud LM Licensing Issues
text: Troubleshooting Cloud LM Licensing Issues The following section provides resolution for the error which occurs while registering your Registration Token. If an error occurs while registering your Registration Token, check whether: You have entered the Registration Token correctly You have connection to the internet The Entitlement ID is activated on the Sentinel EMS Customer Portal You have exceeded the count of the Registration Token The number of sessions is greater than the quantity of licenses you have on your Entitlement (sessions are listed per license feature) The Registration Token is still valid Note: Registration Tokens have an expiry set when they are created. They are valid for a maximum of 30 days. The Registration Token must be registered within this period in order to connect to the Cloud License Manager. To troubleshoot further: Add the following to [SETTINGS] in your ulic.asn file: Explain this code [SETTINGS] trace $trc_start=usyslog:<trace file name>.log $trc_levels=9L Copy Check the trace file for any error codes, for example: 210001SNTL_NO_LICENSE_GIVEN —the licensing token for a given feature cannot be obtained, for example if the authentication token has not yet been generated. 210018SNTL_NO_SUCH_FEATURE —the requested feature is not available on the Entitlement. For a full list of error codes and a description of the error, see the Licensing Library Error and Result Codes . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
